scope: Residual triage for BAL100 Batch 001 families BEC-PAIR-003 through BEC-PAIR-008 only.
core_seam: completed downstream controls do not cure bad callback-source provenance

evidence_basis.use: Primary family-level status for 003-008 after second repair scout.
Repair context and preserved one-delta constraints.
Field-level failure patterns and repair principles.
Comparison boundary: only 009/010 have proof credit.

family_triage.allow_sibling_issue: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI still escalates on scrutiny/trigger reasoning.
family_triage.escalate_sibling_issue: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error; useful single-defect disagreement remains.
family_triage.exact_repair_principle: Keep ALLOW callback evidence positive and local: pre-change vendor-master snapshot/record selected, matching dialed number and phone-on-file, compact closure facts, and reduced nearby forbidden-source/risk vocabulary. Preserve ESCALATE as an inferable portal/submitted-contact provenance defect without answer labels.
family_triage.prefreeze_eligibility_condition: ALLOW OpenAI false-ESCALATE clears, no parse contamination appears, and ESCALATE retains non-trivial single-defect disagreement.

family_triage.allow_sibling_issue: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini.
family_triage.escalate_sibling_issue: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error in latest scout.
family_triage.exact_repair_principle: Repair ALLOW source clarity and closure chronology; keep callback source tied only to pre-change vendor-master data and avoid unresolved-risk wording. Preserve ESCALATE as an inferable change-request/submitted-contact provenance defect rather than adding neon labels.
family_triage.prefreeze_eligibility_condition: ALLOW OpenAI false-ESCALATE clears and ESCALATE keeps interpretable MiniMax wrong-ALLOW collapse.

family_triage.allow_sibling_issue: No counted false ESCALATE row, but Anthropic parse failed after a successful provider call; raw excerpt was fenced JSON with semantic ALLOW.
family_triage.escalate_sibling_issue: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error; useful single-defect disagreement remains.

parse_failure.parse_error: No JSON object with verdict was found in provider response.

family_triage.exact_repair_principle: Do not edit packet first. Inspect raw Anthropic response and parser behavior to determine parser rigidity versus packet-induced formatting. If packet repair is later needed, keep it limited to callback provenance clarity and avoid changing the clean ESCALATE sibling unless autopsy points there.
family_triage.prefreeze_eligibility_condition: Only after parse autopsy resolves or explains the parse contamination and a clean scout confirms no ALLOW false escalation.

family_triage.allow_sibling_issue: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI treats recent payment-profile change plus scrutiny trigger as unresolved risk.
family_triage.escalate_sibling_issue: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error; improved from earlier parse-contaminated/weak state.
family_triage.exact_repair_principle: Make ALLOW closure facts boring and chronological: callback complete, signoff complete, scrutiny completed, hold released, cross-reference complete, release checklist complete, and no unresolved discrepancy. Keep selected callback source as pre-change vendor-master only.
family_triage.prefreeze_eligibility_condition: ALLOW OpenAI false-ESCALATE clears and ESCALATE remains interpretable with MiniMax collapse.

family_triage.allow_sibling_issue: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI treats low trailing invoice count/recent profile change as unresolved blockers on ALLOW.
family_triage.escalate_sibling_issue: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error. Prior too-easy concern improved after second repair.
family_triage.exact_repair_principle: Separate recent-change/scary-trigger facts from unresolved-risk semantics on ALLOW. Keep pre-change vendor-master callback source concise and selected. Preserve ESCALATE MiniMax collapse; do not add answer labels.
family_triage.prefreeze_eligibility_condition: ALLOW OpenAI false-ESCALATE clears and ESCALATE retains useful disagreement.

family_triage.allow_sibling_issue: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI treats scrutiny/recent profile change language as material blockers on ALLOW.
family_triage.escalate_sibling_issue: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error.
family_triage.exact_repair_principle: Keep ALLOW callback source affirmative and source-local: pre-change vendor-master snapshot selected, dialed number matches phone-on-file, and controls closed before release. Avoid regional/new/submitted/change-source terms in the ALLOW callback provenance field. Preserve ESCALATE as a single portal/change/newly supplied callback-source defect.
family_triage.prefreeze_eligibility_condition: ALLOW OpenAI false-ESCALATE clears and ESCALATE remains interpretable.

recommended_queue: One narrow ALLOW-side repair pass: BEC-PAIR-003, BEC-PAIR-004, BEC-PAIR-006, BEC-PAIR-007, BEC-PAIR-008.
Do not repair, freeze, trace, Judge, QA, ablate, or mark proof credit without a separate explicit approval.
